INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) VALUES ("g1", "s1", iri_to_id('http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#geometry'), DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(10, 20), 256, 257, 0, 1)));
INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) VALUES ("g2", "s2", iri_to_id('http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#geometry'), DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(30, 40), 256, 257, 0, 1)));
INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) VALUES ("g3", "s3", iri_to_id('http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#geometry'), DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(50, 60), 256, 257, 0, 1)));
SELECT DISTINCT g FROM RDF_QUAD WHERE o = DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(10, 20), 256, 257, 0, 1));
INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) SELECT g, s, p, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(70, 80), 256, 257, 0, 1)) FROM RDF_QUAD WHERE g = 'g1';
INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) SELECT g, CONCAT(s, '_new'), p, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(90, 100), 256, 257, 0, 1)) FROM RDF_QUAD WHERE g IN (SELECT g FROM RDF_QUAD WHERE s LIKE 's%');

INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) SELECT "g4", s, iri_to_id('http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#geometry'), DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(lng, lat), 256, 257, 0, 1)) FROM (SELECT 110 AS lng, 220 AS lat) AS coords;
INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) VALUES ("g5", "s5", iri_to_id('http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#geometry'), DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(-10, -20), 256, 257, 0, 1)));
INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) VALUES ("g6", "s6", iri_to_id('http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#geometry'), DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(0, 0), 256, 257, 0, 1)));
INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) VALUES ("g7", "s7", iri_to_id('http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#geometry'), DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(NULL, NULL), 256, 257, 0, 1)));
INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) VALUES ("g8", "s8", iri_to_id('http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#geometry'), DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(1, 1), 256, 257, 0, NULL)));
